programs.title: Motown Magic
programs.desc: Imaginative boy Ben transforms his city by bringing colourful street art to life, armed with a magic paintbrush and the classic sounds of motown.

programs.title: The Magic Canoe
programs.desc: Julie walks away from the camp without saying where she is going. The other travellers are worried and Max warns her not to go any further. The canoe adventure takes the travellers to the far north. During this expedition, Julie will understand that getting away from her group can be really dangerous!

programs.title: Spartakus and the Sun Beneath the Sea
programs.desc: Bob and Rebecca have collected the fragments of a kind of fossil, which they manage to reconstruct and discover it is a mask. Shortly after, our heroes wake up in a strange clearing.

programs.title: The World According to Grandpa
programs.desc: Connie asks 'What are volcanoes?' and Grandpa spins a tale about Peggy the Penguin who dreamed of being a world famous Chilli Chef and set up her restaurant inside a mountain in Hawaii!

programs.title: Chums
programs.desc: The chums gather around the campfire sharing spooky stories after dark.

programs.title: Mysteries Of The Mekong
programs.desc: Chart the seasonal ebb and flow of the Mekong through Cambodia - a nation where everything has a special relationship with water.
